questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'suggest' в предложении?

choices.text: He suggested to take a break.
He suggested taking a break.
He suggested take a break.
He suggested that he take a break.

questions.explanation: Глагол 'suggest' требует формы V-ing (taking), а не инфинитива с 'to' или базовой формы.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит ошибку в использовании 'suggest'?

choices.text: They suggested meeting at noon.
She suggested going to the cinema.
We suggested to discuss the issue.
He suggested visiting the museum.

questions.explanation: После 'suggest' не используется 'to + verb', правильный вариант: suggest + V-ing.

questions.prompt: Как правильно сказать: 'Она предложила пойти на концерт'?

choices.text: She suggested to go to the concert.
She suggested going to the concert.
She suggested go to the concert.
She suggested that go to the concert.

questions.explanation: Глагол 'suggest' требует формы V-ing (going), поэтому 'going' верно.

choices.text: The teacher suggested taking a break.
They suggested to meet tomorrow.
He suggested finishing the project early.
We suggested having a meeting.

questions.explanation: После 'suggest' не используется 'to + verb', правильный вариант: suggest + V-ing.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно выражает идею 'предложить встретиться'?

choices.text: They suggested to meet.
They suggested meeting.
They suggested meet.
They suggested that meet.

questions.explanation: Правильная конструкция: suggest + V-ing, поэтому 'meeting' верно.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит ошибку в использовании 'suggest'?

choices.text: She suggested taking a walk.
He suggested to take a walk.
They suggested going to the beach.
We suggested discussing the plan.

questions.explanation: После 'suggest' не используется 'to + verb', поэтому 'to take' ошибка.

questions.prompt: Как правильно использовать 'suggest' в предложении 'Он предложил сделать перерыв'?

choices.text: He suggested to make a break.
He suggested making a break.
He suggested make a break.
He suggested that make a break.

questions.explanation: Глагол 'suggest' требует формы V-ing (making), поэтому 'making' верно.

choices.text: They suggested taking a bus.
She suggested to take a bus.
He suggested taking a taxi.
We suggested taking a train.

questions.explanation: После 'suggest' не используется 'to + verb', поэтому 'to take' ошибка.

choices.text: The manager suggested to hire a new employee.
The manager suggested hiring a new employee.
The manager suggested hire a new employee.
The manager suggested that hire a new employee.

questions.explanation: Правильная форма: suggest + V-ing, поэтому 'hiring' верно.

choices.text: They suggested meeting at 6 PM.
She suggested going to the party.
He suggested to go to the party.
We suggested discussing the problem.

questions.explanation: После 'suggest' не используется 'to + verb', поэтому 'to go' ошибка.
